summary: Matched or improved menu/game-mode utility functions across gm_1832, mnname, and mnruleplus, replacing placeholder function markers with C implementations and updating recovered prototypes in headers. Bot report confirms 4 new 100% function matches and one additional 98.72% improvement, while the PR body claims all listed functions were 100% matched via objdiff and ninja built cleanly.

key_files.role: Implemented fn_8018846C using lbl_80473700 state, pl_8004134C, and Player_GetPlayerCharacter.
Updated fn_8018846C prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to int fn_8018846C(void).
Implemented mnName_GetPageCount, mnName_GetColumnCount, and mnName_802388D4 name-entry helpers.
Updated recovered prototypes for mnName_GetPageCount, mnName_GetColumnCount, and mnName_802388D4.
Added AnimLoopSettings/data arrays and implemented mn_80232458 rules-menu helper.

what_changed: Replaced placeholder /// #fn_8018846C with an int-returning implementation in gm_1832.c and updated its header prototype.
Replaced placeholders for mnName_GetPageCount and mnName_GetColumnCount with loops over 0x78 name slots using IsNameValid, calculating page count by 24 and column count by 6.
Implemented mnName_802388D4 as an HSD_JObj* lookup helper that walks child/next links for indices below 0x18 and uses a switch for indices 0x18 through 0x1A.
Updated mnname.h prototypes from unknown signatures to concrete s32/HSD_JObj* signatures.
Added mn_803ED270, mn_803ED294, and mn_803ED2E8 data in mnruleplus.c and implemented mn_80232458 to return AnimLoopSettings pointers based on option, value, and direction.
Bot report records 4 new 100% matches: mnName_GetPageCount, mnName_802388D4, fn_8018846C, and mn_80232458; it also records mnName_GetColumnCount as improved to 98.72%, not listed as a new full match.
smart_moves: Recovered owning header prototypes alongside function bodies instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS after signatures were known.
Used compact counting loops for name-entry pagination rather than preserving repeated generated blocks.
Used a bounded switch for special mnName_802388D4 index cases, which makes the non-grid object lookups explicit.
Kept address-style names such as fn_8018846C and mnName_802388D4 where the PR evidence does not prove better semantic names.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When function bodies prove signatures, update the owning header in the same PR so UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS do not persist.
Simple counted scans over fixed menu slots can be represented as natural for-loops when the recovered logic is a count over valid entries.
For index-to-object helpers, a loop for regular sequential children plus a switch for special out-of-range indices can be a reviewable source shape when the diff supports that structure.

naming_conventions.convention: Preserved existing address-style names for functions without stronger semantic naming evidence, including fn_8018846C, mnName_802388D4, and mn_80232458.
Used local role names such as gobj, jobj, index, count, value, direction, result, and ptr where the role is apparent from type or local use.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report shows mnName_GetColumnCount improved to 98.72% rather than 100%, so the slice does not prove this tactic fully closed the match.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added explicit data arrays mn_803ED270, mn_803ED294, and mn_803ED2E8 in mnruleplus.c to support mn_80232458 and improve .data matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Bot report shows mnruleplus .data improved from 59.85% to 67.65%; the slice does not include deeper section ownership evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used concrete pointer casts and fixed offsets from HSD_GObj in mnName_802388D4 for JObj retrieval.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is supported by the diff as the implemented shape, but the slice does not show whether a typed struct field alternative was investigated.

follow_up_queries: mnruleplus mn_803ED270 mn_803ED294 mn_803ED2E8 data ownership

notes: No review comments were present in the loaded slice.
PR body claims all functions verified 100% via objdiff and ninja built cleanly, but the bot report lists only 4 new 100% matches and shows mnName_GetColumnCount at 98.72%.
The PR title says 4 functions, while the body lists fn_8018846C, mn_80232458, and three mnName functions; bot evidence supports 4 full new matches plus one partial improvement.
Data additions in mnruleplus.c are visible and improve .data according to the bot report, but section ownership rationale is not included in the slice.
The slice includes a PAD_STACK tactic but does not include enough evidence to treat it as a broadly accepted pattern.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover header prototypes with matched function bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2303 replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations in gm_1832.h and mnname.h with concrete signatures when the corresponding bodies were implemented.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use natural loops for fixed-slot menu counting
accepted_candidate_records.text: mnName_GetPageCount and mnName_GetColumnCount count valid entries across 0x78 name slots with for-loops and then compute page/column totals.

source_update_candidates.title: Flag PAD_STACK when a function is not fully matched
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2303 uses PAD_STACK(16) in mnName_GetColumnCount, but the bot report shows that function at 98.72% rather than 100%. Consider documenting that PAD_STACK in partially matched functions should be treated as provisional unless verifier evidence proves it is necessary.
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded evidence shows a stack-padding tactic without full-match confirmation for the affected function.

source_update_candidates.title: Reconcile author verification claims with bot reports during intake
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2303 body claims all functions verified 100% via objdiff, while the bot report lists mnName_GetColumnCount as only 98.72%. Consider an intake note that contradictory verification evidence should be preserved rather than collapsed into a match claim.
source_update_candidates.reason: This PR slice contains conflicting verification evidence that is useful for curator policy.

source_update_candidates.title: mnname.c contains name-entry pagination and layout helpers
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2303, mnName_GetPageCount and mnName_GetColumnCount are described as supporting the Name Entry screen by calculating pagination for a 120-slot name list, and mnName_802388D4 is described as a layout callback for rendering the scrollable name grid.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR body provides file/function role descriptions, but curator should decide whether to promote them as path facts.

source_update_candidates.title: mnruleplus.c contains Rules menu option animation lookup logic
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2303, mn_80232458 is described as handling logic in the Rules menu screen and the diff returns AnimLoopSettings pointers based on option, value, direction, and mn_803ED2E8 state.
source_update_candidates.reason: The function role is stated in the PR body and reflected by the diff, but promotion to path facts is curator-owned.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's blanket claim that all listed functions were 100% matched; bot evidence contradicts this for mnName_GetColumnCount.
Do not treat the added mnruleplus data arrays as proven canonical data ownership from this slice alone; only a .data improvement is shown.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or requested changes; no review comments were loaded.
Do not convert Claude-generated wording into independent technical proof without diff or bot-report support.
